name: qwen3-call-center-golden
description: Short Qwen3-TTS source texts for offline call-center ASR A/B scoring. @codex-191-impl 2026-06-02 PDT -- Ground truth is the text field; digit strings are written as spoken words for stable WER.

samples.text: Thanks for calling Motlie support, how can I help today?
Good morning, this is billing support, may I verify your account?
Hi, I am calling about the appointment reminder.
Hello, I need help with my recent order.
Good evening, please connect me with customer care.
This is Alex from Motlie returning your support call.
Thanks for calling, I can help with that request.
Hello, I am checking on my ticket status.
My phone number is four one five five five five zero one two three.
Please call me back at six five zero two one nine eight eight zero zero.
The callback number is two zero six three three four seven seven one nine.
You can reach my office at three one two four four zero nine nine nine nine.
My mobile number is nine one seven zero zero eight six four two one.
The best number is seven one eight five zero three two two two two.
Text updates to eight five eight seven seven seven one zero one zero.
Use the alternate line four two five six six six four zero zero five.
My account number is one zero zero four two seven nine.
The service ticket is eight six three zero one five.
Please look up case number two two nine seven four.
The invoice number is seven zero four four one eight.
My member identifier is five five zero zero nine three one.
The confirmation code is nine eight two one six.
Reference number three one three five eight seven is on the email.
The order code is zero zero six four seven two.
The card ends in four four two one.
Use the card ending in zero nine eight seven.
My security code is three seven five.
The expiration date is zero eight twenty seven.
The last four digits are six two zero zero.
Please charge the card ending one two three four.
The verification code is nine one one.
The billing zip is nine four one zero seven.
My last name is Chung, spelled C H U N G.
The company name is Motlie, spelled M O T L I E.
My first name is Priya, spelled P R I Y A.
The patient name is Ellis, spelled E L L I S.
My street is Pine, spelled P I N E.
The agent name is Omar, spelled O M A R.
My email name is Avery, spelled A V E R Y.
The city is Tempe, spelled T E M P E.
The address is one two Main Street, apartment five.
Send it to four zero eight Cedar Avenue.
My office is at nine hundred Market Street.
The delivery address is seven one Lake Drive.
Use suite two hundred at fifteen Oak Plaza.
The billing address is thirty North First Street.
Please update the address to six Pine Circle.
Mail the form to eighty two River Road.
Yes, that is the correct account.
No, I did not authorize that payment.
Yes, please send the confirmation by text.
No, the appointment time does not work.
Yes, I can hold for the next agent.
No, please cancel the second order.
Yes, my address has changed recently.
No, I need to speak with support.
Please repeat the last message.
Transfer me to billing support.
Send the receipt to my email.
Update my callback number now.
Hold the line for one minute.
Cancel the appointment for Friday.
Read back the confirmation code.
Please mark this case urgent.
What is the balance due today?
When will the technician arrive?
Can you hear me clearly now?
Why was my payment declined?
Where can I upload the document?
Do you need my date of birth?
Is the refund already approved?
May I schedule a morning callback?
